next_experiment: Derive c and delta from actual Vaughan coefficients and reject every endpoint-only interpolation.
claim_boundary: No conjecture proof and no certified conjecture counterexample.
proof_boundary: The no-go and interpolation theorem are exact. The candidate c=1, delta=0.07 is not proved for Vaughan coefficients, and even a valid obstruction bound would still require parity survival and exact-gap positivity.
